projectDescription: A full-stack logistics management platform built with Spring Boot microservices and React, providing inventory tracking, order processing, and shipment management through a JWT-secured API gateway.
keyFeatures: Inventory management with SKU tracking, warehouse assignment, and low-stock alerts
Order processing for national and international orders with real-time stock validation
Shipment tracking with a four-stage delivery pipeline (CREADO → ASIGNADO → EN_RUTA → ENTREGADO)
Event-driven async notifications when orders are approved
JWT-based authentication with a centralized API gateway enforcing security across all services
Circuit breaker pattern (Resilience4j) for resilient cross-service communication
Database-per-service architecture for independent data isolation
React SPA dashboard with kanban-style shipment board and real-time stat cards
